title: polianthes jaliscana
intro: Polianthes jaliscana, also known as the Mexican tuberose or Mexican starflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asphodelaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Polianthes jaliscana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
